text:
Market today: Tech just had one of its worst weeks in a year. The real driver is a dangerous combo — AI momentum cracking, a U.S. strike on Iran adding geopolitical risk, and now a Fed official floating a rate HIKE. That cocktail is poison for high-multiple, margin-sensitive tech books like yours.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest problem — down 16% and flagged SELL; on margin that hole is real and growing. PLTR is also flagged SELL at -13%; if AI sentiment keeps unwinding, it has further to fall. SPAL is a 2x leveraged SpaceX ETF already down nearly 17% — leveraged ETFs decay fast, and headline 6 shows SpaceX bonds are flashing warning signs, which could spook this name hard. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited data — handle manually and keep that stop tight.

Watch: (1) Whether the Iran situation escalates — risk-off moves crush your entire book. (2) Any Fed follow-through on Kashkari's rate-hike signal — that's a direct headwind for growth tech.

Bottom line: You have too many open wounds on margin — prioritize stopping the bleeding on AVGO and PLTR before adding any new risk.
